titleStmt.title: SII 24.473: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 473. (A.R. No. 58 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers gift of lands, after purchase, by Naraśiṅga-Gaṅgaya, son of Nāgu-Śetti of the Neḍuṅgumāra-gōtra, for offerings to the god every evening and for unguents and offerings on Fridays. Mentions Gaṅgayadēva-Mahārāja and Viṭṭhaladēva Mahārāja who were connected with the lands which were given. The date of the record viz. Śaka 1475, Parīdhāvin, (expired), Pramādīcha (current), Mēsha, śu. 1, Thursday, Bharaṇi, correspond to 1553 A.D., April 13. ·87; ·73.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvuran śrīvirapratāpa sadāśiva devamaharāyat prathivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śagābdam 1000 4 100 7 10 5 ṉ mec cellāniṉṟa paridāpi
samvatssarattukkuc cellum pramādica samvatsarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu purva pakṣattu prathamaiyum brahaspati vāramum peṟṟa bharaṇi nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulācanivaḷanāṭṭu
viḷāvaṟāvitivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅganātha devar śrī paṇḍārattukku (tirumalai) tirumalai tiruppati cantirakiric cīrmaikkuḷ viṭṭa tiruveṅkaṭa toṭṭattil tiruppatiyil sahasra
gotrattil neṭuṅkumāra gotrattil nāku ceṭṭiyār putran vaṅkāparam nārāyaṇa ceṭṭi keruṭaṉ nā ciṅka kaṅkayaṉeṉ teṇṭaṉniṭṭu śilāśāsanam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi tiruccilāpaḷḷi
Ucāvaṭiyil Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattil kīḻpalāṟṟu perumāḷ śrīraṅganāthadevar tiruviḷai Āṭṭam Āṉa teḷaṅkaḷ paṇṭamaṅkalam cervai Āṉa Akilāṇṭapuram Āṉa Akkuṟārattil mahājaṉaṅkaḷil tiruvantinātaṉ kaiyil
tiruppati rājāviṉ perpaṭa kaṅkaiya devamahārājā koṇṭuṭaiyatāṉa cātaṉappaṭikku poṉ varāta paṭiyāle tiruppati rājāvin perpaṭṭa cātaṉat tukku rājā tiruviṭṭu paṭi tirukkā
ceṭṭi peṇcāti veṅkaṭattāḷum Iḷaiya peṇcāti kaṉṉāḷum makaḷ nācciyāḷum makaṉ nāraāyaṇaṉum Āka koṇṭuṭaiya kāṇi nilattil ¥ teṉṉūril ko toṇṭai maṇṭalattil tātatteru
ril mantramutti Anaṉtapaṭṭar viṭṭalateva mahārājāviṉ vakaiyil tārāpūṟuvakam Āka peṟṟuṭaiyatāṉa nilam 2- li ¥ muṉṉāḷ raṅgarāgu naṉṉāṉūril paṭṭar kaiyilum
nākāpaṭṭar kaiyilum kraiyam Ākak koṇṭu cūṭikkoṭutta nācciyār koyilil perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷa veṇumeṉṟu poliyūṭṭukkuc cittiraimāsam poliyūṭṭu naṭatta Oṇṇāte
ṉṟu perumāḷ parikalam kuṭukkaiyil Anta nilam U raṅgarāguve Aṉupavittuk koṇṭu varukaiyil muṉṉāḷ paṇṇina poliyūṭṭu varāmal Ivar maritttu ponapaṭiyiṉāle raṅgarāguvin makaṉ veṅkaṭātrikaiyil
nāḷ kraiyam Āka paṇṇik koṇṭuṭaiyatāṉa tirumālaipuram rutta nilam n=taØ Āka vanta 3li koṇṭuṭaiyatāna nilam nilam ṉālaraiyearaikkālum kovil paṇṭārattile kaṭṭi ko
ṇṭu Inta nilaṅkaḷil kraiyam koṇṭu Ilaik koṭai tirumālai veḷaiyile cantiyā kālattile Āka nāḷ toṟum Amutu ceytaruḷum vaṭaippaṭi � vaṭai 5 10 1¥ puḻuku kāppu cukriṟavāram toṟum
cātti Aruḷukiṟa Anantaram Āka Amutu ceytaruḷum cīṭaittiruppaṇṇiyārappaṭi 4 poṉ Uru 5 10 1 Āka Inta vakaippaṭit tiruppaṇiyāram nāḷtoṟum cukkiṟavāram toṟum śantrātittavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭava
rākavum Inta viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu pattil Oṉṟukku ruppaṭi Añcu śrīraṅganārāyaṇajiyaṟku vaṭai 1¥ ṅkāṟku vaṭai 2¥ Āccayaṅkār Ayyaṉukku vaṭai 1¥ kāvaṉūr tirumalaiyaṉukku
vaṭai 1 Āka vaṭai 5� cīṭait tiruppaṇiyāram vārantoṟum viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu tirukkaccinampikku varukiṟa tirumalainampi 10 2 Āka Uru 5 Āka Inta vakaippaṭi tiruppaṇiyāram candrādityavaraiyum santāna param
paraiyāka Aṉupavittukkoḷḷak kaṭavarākavum Inta śilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku kovilk kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇa priyaṉ Eḻuttu . dānapālanayormmaddhye dānātśreyonu pālanam . dānāt svargamav[*ā]pnoti
pālanādacyutam padam .
Digital edition of SII 24.473 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
